title: Build the input scrubbing stage
description: Construct normalization, length-bounding, control-stripping, and PII-redaction passes that run before assembly.
body: Steps: 1. Normalize encoding and whitespace on incoming input. 2. Bound length and reject or truncate oversized input. 3. Strip or escape control characters and instruction-like delimiters. 4. Run PII detection and redact or tokenize matches, keeping the map outside the prompt. 5. Label the cleaned output as data. Rollback point: before relaxing any redaction rule. Validation: seeded PII is redacted, oversized input is bounded, and delimiter-laden input cannot break out of the data block, all checked before assembly.
